ClippyCore

Use this template for a bullet proof Bug Report

name: 🐛 Bug Report about: Create a report to help us improve title: '[Bug]: ' labels: bug assignees: ''

Describe the Bug A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

To Reproduce Steps to reproduce the behavior:

  1. Go to x
  2. Click on x then y, then z
  3. See error

Expected Behavior A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

Screenshots & Log Errors If applicable, add screenshots and/or any Log errors to help explain your problem.

Env (please complete the following information):

  • OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
  • .NET Runtime: [if Applicable]
  • Project Target Framework: [if building your own project outside of ClippyDesktop and ClippyWord, that uses ClippyCore]
  • Any other relevant info

Additional Context Add any other context about the problem here.
